urdu transliteration text:
Teri masoom sakina ko pilaake paani
After feeding your Sakina water,

Kal teri pyaas bujhaega Ali ka saani
Ali's heir (Hazrat Abbas) will alleviate your thirst tomorrow
Mein tujhe dekhar apni pyaas bujhaloon
english translation text: Let me alleviate my thirst by looking at you

urdu transliteration text: Aaj ki raat tujhe godhi mein sulaloon mere asghar aaja
english translation text: Let me put you to sleep in my lap tonight, come my Asghar
